ml_D_D.ui package

Submodules

ml_D_D.ui.console module

ui/console.py Console log helper functions.

ml_D_D.ui.console.clear_console() → None[source]
ml_D_D.ui.console.log(msg: str, level: str = 'info') → None[source]

ml_D_D.ui.layout module

ui/layout.py Builds the main DearPyGui window and all child panels:

  • Block palette (left)

  • Canvas tab bar (centre)

  • Training config + plots (right)

  • Console log (bottom)

  • Status bar (bottom edge)

ml_D_D.ui.layout.build_main_window() → None[source]

ml_D_D.ui.menubar module

ui/menubar.py Builds the DearPyGui viewport menu bar. All callbacks are imported from their respective logic modules.

ml_D_D.ui.menubar.build_menubar() → None[source]

ml_D_D.ui.palette module

ui/palette.py Block palette panel: search filtering and button rebuild.

ml_D_D.ui.palette.on_search(sender, app_data) → None[source]
ml_D_D.ui.palette.rebuild_palette() → None[source]

ml_D_D.ui.resize module

ui/resize.py Viewport resize callback.

ml_D_D.ui.resize.resize_callback() → None[source]

ml_D_D.ui.statusbar module

ui/statusbar.py refresh_status() is called by nodes, tabs, and undo whenever the node/link counts or undo stack depths change.

ml_D_D.ui.statusbar.refresh_status() → None[source]

Update node/link counts, undo depth, window title, and footer project name.

ml_D_D.ui.summary module

ui/summary.py Model summary panel.

ml_D_D.ui.summary.refresh_model_summary() → None[source]

ml_D_D.ui.toolbar module

ui/toolbar.py The thin toolbar strip that sits above the canvas panel.

ml_D_D.ui.toolbar.build_toolbar() → None[source]

ml_D_D.ui.training module

ui/training.py Training state machine: on_run(), on_pause(), on_stop(), per-frame tick, node highlighting, and CUDA/VRAM menubar stats.

ml_D_D.ui.training.apply_train_btn_style() → None[source]
